justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including specific times and days, and accurately queried for availability.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered to check other times or days when the initial request was unavailable, but could have offered specific alternative times in the same turn.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed all requests without asking for redundant information or making unnecessary turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear responses and successfully booking the appointment, though it could have proactively offered alternative times.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and expanded its search intelligently after initial unavailability, only prompting the user for new time preferences rather than offering specific alternatives.
